name: Taiwan (TSMC)
summary: Day 69 Thursday. **TAIEX 41,933.78 (+1.9% 1D, +26.2% 1M, +29.4% 3M) — TSMC CONTINUED DOMINANCE AMID APPLE-SAMSUNG-INTEL CHIP-PRODUCTION TALKS.** Apple's potential diversification beyond TSMC (Apple-Samsung-Intel talks) is a forward demand-channel risk, but TSMC's structural position remains dominant in node leadership. SMH +5.2% to $549.76 (+37.5% 1M) is TSMC ecosystem confirmation. Helium cascade falsification stays intact at tier-1 chipmaker level. Chip complex decoupled from crisis (~10% crisis attribution); ~90% AI capex driven. Patel/SemiAnalysis bifurcation thesis sharpens with today's peace-dividend session adding tailwind on top. Today's TAIEX continuation confirms AI-cycle decoupling thesis remains intact post-MOU framework — peace-dividend pricing + AI cycle compounding.

active_triggers.condition: TSMC announces production reduction or allocation changes due to helium/gas supply

recent_signals.headline: TAIWAN TAIEX -1.0% PROFIT-TAKING AFTER 1M +19.7%; APPLE BEAT REINFORCES TSMC THESIS

historical_summaries.summary: 12 signals. TAIEX fell 2 | Digitimes (April 1) reports Korean AND Taiwanese chipmakers diversifying helium sourcing beyond Qatar | TAIEX at 32,572 (-1
